Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Marylene's Fallacy Lapis Amulet Unique ID: c5c8097b0dca8bf5e6885f5674f8fd839f09977513d857a5333b02a08795c7f4 Item Level: 83 LevelReq: 5 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Allocates Force of Darkness +29 to Intelligence +126 to Accuracy Rating +346% to Global Critical Strike Multiplier +105 to Evasion Rating 9% increased Light Radius 45% less Critical Strike Chance Critical Strikes have Culling Strike Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE The Gull Raven Mask Evasion: 248 EvasionBasePercentile: 0.4148 Energy Shield: 122 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.4074 Unique ID: 85210e7b140449ba13ed4b6722566ee3f050c36e833894f5261287dd255fe7e7 Item Level: 85 Quality: 0 Sockets: G-G-B-B LevelReq: 38 Implicits: 1 Socketed Skill Gems get a 90% Cost & Reservation Multiplier Trigger Level 1 Create Lesser Shrine when you Kill an Enemy 125% increased Evasion and Energy Shield +31 to maximum Energy Shield +72 to maximum Life +31% to Cold Resistance 75% increased Effect of Shrine Buffs on you 50% increased Duration of Shrine Effects on you Corrupted

Rarity: RARE Torment Stride Fugitive Boots Evasion: 139 EvasionBasePercentile: 0.2255 Energy Shield: 40 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.2667 Unique ID: 60374182bb8d630fbd3e0a46f0d26eddf0b3be922127916370cefbb5d0e7e477 Hunter Item Redeemer Item Item Level: 87 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-B-B-B LevelReq: 70 Implicits: 1 +17% to Chaos Resistance +44% to Lightning Resistance 30% increased Movement Speed 100% chance to Avoid being Chilled 56% chance to Avoid being Shocked 9% chance to gain Elusive on Critical Strike 25% increased Effect of Tailwind on you You have Tailwind if you have dealt a Critical Strike Recently {crafted}+70 to maximum Life

Rarity: UNIQUE The Golden Charlatan Lion Sword Unique ID: 467191369f21d6746397e497d6822284847506dfb9c99c3979e2b404d29303c4 Item Level: 87 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-G-G-B-B-B LevelReq: 65 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Quality does not increase Physical Damage {crafted}Grants 1% increased Area of Effect per 4% Quality +50 to Strength and Dexterity +200 Intelligence Requirement 221% increased Physical Damage 11% increased Attack Speed 127% increased Critical Strike Chance Critical Strikes with this Weapon do not deal extra Damage Gain a random Shrine Buff for 30 seconds when you Kill a Rare or Unique Enemy +1 to maximum Mana per 2 Intelligence

Rarity: MAGIC Upgraded Crude Bow Unique ID: 7aa0aaacc1b8cbc00e3c85686bc4aff21aca5c5febdccf6e0ef4878cd162986f Item Level: 4 Quality: 0 Sockets: W-W-W-W-W-W LevelReq: 64 Implicits: 0 {crafted}+8% to Quality of Socketed Gems

Rarity: RARE Plague Coat Necrotic Armour Evasion: 3562 EvasionBasePercentile: 0.9989 Energy Shield: 734 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.9999 Unique ID: a96ae1ccbae584301ed05730eab8bb6e98564306833c49f7a9d5d522985aad90 Shaper Item Crusader Item Item Level: 86 Quality: 30 Sockets: W-W-W-W-W-W LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 {crafted}15% increased Explicit Defence Modifier magnitudes {crafted}200% increased Attribute Requirements Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 20 Item Rarity +22% chance to Suppress Spell Damage +426 to Evasion Rating 118% increased Evasion and Energy Shield +92 to maximum Energy Shield 37% increased Area of Effect Enemies you Kill have a 35% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Physical Damage 25% increased Rarity of Items found from Slain Unique Enemies

Rarity: UNIQUE Progenesis Amethyst Flask Unique ID: 65171ac177843649e2f65275f99debc817df7896fa6b6a99d9b1e72d93c24a8a Item Level: 87 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 18 Implicits: 1 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full 18% reduced Charges per use 10% reduced Duration When Hit during effect, 25% of Life loss from Damage taken occurs over 4 seconds instead

Rarity: MAGIC Dabbler's Quicksilver Flask of the Kaleidoscope Unique ID: 24759d6b8322476f7efcb85ce23e47b3fc71acddf003c456341e3c3c5c7afd49 Item Level: 75 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 40 Implicits: 1 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full 31% reduced Duration 25% increased effect 15% additional Elemental Resistances during Effect
